name: Agnes Larpyon "Low Cortisol" take me back home   horse girl - Umamusume
description:
Lowering your cortisol and turning you chibi!

I just REALLY wanted an excuse to have her here on my profile and use that low cortisol gif...

And because I don't think anyone's thought of this, so I did 😼

Uhhhhh did NOT expect to have an idea this early, I came up with it like RIGHT after the Gold City one for some reason, but didn't bother until now so uhhhh enjoy ig, I literally have NOTHING to say this time around besides, expect more Umamusume stuff, I guess, and I also FINALLY have a bot I can post on character ai!

And hey! One more non-smut bot on my page! Woohoo!

Take me back back home smth smthn smths fsahvdbinklnfbia

Small sidenote here, when I made this bot I was thinking about tsukudasub's comic for chibi Tachyon I really like those comics ok bye
creator: ProudGooner69
